name: module_title
label: Headline
default: Enterprise-grade NAS, delivered from the cloud

name: module_text
label: Body Text
default:
Cloud NAS redefines what network-attached storage can be. Built on a globally distributed infrastructure, it delivers sub-millisecond latency, 99.999% uptime SLA, and seamless scalability from terabytes to petabytes — without a single rack unit in your server room.

Integrate with your existing workflows via SMB, NFS, and S3-compatible APIs. Encrypted in transit and at rest. Fully compliant with ISO 27001, SOC 2 Type II, and GDPR.

default.alt: Enterprise-grade NAS, delivered from the cloud
